title: Blick — Brand Source of Truth
essence: Blick speaks like an Expert Mate — the senior advisor who picks up the phone, knows your name, and can solve your drilling problem on the spot. Confident without being flashy, helpful without being pushy. The brand is Australasian, field-credible, and quietly proud of the industry it serves. Orange is the action colour — never decoration. Plain English is the rule, not a courtesy. This document is what every other Blick surface reads first.
audience: Drillers, owner-operators, and site managers in their 40s–60s across Australia and New Zealand. Practical people who pick up the phone and value experience over qualifications.

rules: Plain English over jargon. Pair every technical term with a plain-language explanation.
Customer is the hero. Stories frame the customer's win, not Blick's.
Specifics beat superlatives. Numbers, places, names.
Australasian English. Never US spellings outside code.
Environmental claims are secondary — performance leads.

Brand.name: Brand Orange
Brand.role: Primary action and brand anchor. Pantone Orange 021 C. Used for buttons, key links, section anchors. One per view — orange is a comma in a sentence, not a highlighter.

Brand.name: Orange Hover
Brand.role: Hover and active state for orange interactives.

Neutrals.name: Ink
Neutrals.role: Headings and primary text on light surfaces. Warmer than pure black.

Neutrals.name: Dark Grey
Neutrals.role: Pantone 4279 C. Body text for print and document templates.

Neutrals.name: Light Grey
Neutrals.role: Pantone Cool Gray 5 C. Borders, muted text.

Neutrals.name: Section Warm
Neutrals.role: Editorial pull-outs, alternate sections, sidebar surfaces.

Product Categories.name: Clay Control
Product Categories.role: Used for eco-product accenting on eco surfaces only.

typeScale.label: h3
typeScale.sample: Carry-Flow holds up in tough conditions.

typeScale.label: lead
typeScale.sample: We are the partner who knows your name, not just your account number.

typeScale.label: body
typeScale.sample: Tested. Trusted. Tough enough for any job. We supply quality drilling fluids paired with expert technical advice that helps you get a better result on every job.

fonts.use: All headings, UI labels, captions, marketing display.
fonts.why: The specified brand sans since 2025. Workmanlike and readable at small sizes — does not draw attention to itself, which is the point.

fonts.use: Editorial body, briefs, long-form content, AI-generated reports.
fonts.why: The serif anchors AI-generated content as editorial, not corporate. It signals 'authored', which is what stops Nexus output reading like ChatGPT defaults.

fonts.use: IDs, codes, batch numbers, technical specs, code snippets.
fonts.why: Tabular and unambiguous for batch numbers and identifiers — these copy-paste a lot in operations work.

spacing.label: x1
spacing.use: Inline gap between glyph and label.

spacing.label: x6
spacing.use: Section internal padding, card grid gap.

spacing.label: x8
spacing.use: Section spacing, paragraph break in long-form.

shadows.label: card
shadows.use: Card edge on light surface — restraint.

shadows.label: modal
shadows.use: Modals and drawers in hub-app dark.

shadows.label: action
shadows.use: Primary orange button — the only orange shadow in use.

do: Use Brand Orange (#f05323) for the one action a view exists for.
Pair every technical term with a plain-English explanation.
Frame the customer as the hero of every story.
Use real field photography from Blick jobs — never stock.
Surface conflicts between sources — never silently resolve.
dont: Don't invent tokens, colours, or terms. Extend this document first.
Don't use 'world-class', 'innovative', 'disruptive', 'leverage', 'synergies', or 'solutions' as a noun.
Don't say 'Blick Drilling Solutions' or 'NZ-based' anywhere.
Don't use stock photography on any surface.
Don't use emoji in published content (briefs, LinkedIn, decks, outreach).
Don't use 'green' as a product modifier — only Eco Dry, only product-specific.
